text:
Ugh... Leofric was missing today.  We went to find him... he was pretty upset.  There was news from Cheliax.  Thrune declared war... but some of the Hellknights refused to join her.

We argued about... maybe WORKING with Hellknights?   How could we do that?  But, maybe some of them aren't so bad... ugh, {d:Sang'et damnis!:blood and damnation}, they can't be trusted!  I just.. I don't know.  {d:Rogus et cinera.:Pyre and ash}...

Leofric, meanwhile.... ugh, {d:Cal'acutus.:smartass}, he says I better start reading or else I'm just doing what the Order of the Rack does.  Whatever, {d:In ignem eum.:burn him}.

Malgrin came later.  We talked about undead.
Figure out how to use wands!

title: Goblins...
text:
We found a goblin today. She was murdered by the Isgeri Slayers. We were only supposed to get them to leave, but... but! {d:Inferis da mihi patientiam.:Hell give me patience} .. how can anyone be like that man? He thought of them as just.. {d:Bestae!:Monsters}! But she was not a monster. She was wearing a pumpkin for a helmet.... Neekla told me what that meant. It means a lot.

I tried to .. {d:Terr'eos.:Frighten them}, get them to leave. Some of them did. But the {d:Sikarius.:Murderer}, the one who had her helmet as a {d:Spol'um.:Trophy}, he was just.. he didn't even flinch. He attacked us the moment he knew we weren't going to let him stay here. I know that Rhokrag told us to avoid killing, and I don't want to... but the thought of him getting past us, killing more goblins... I couldn't... he murdered her!

His blood ... stains my armor. I should clean it.
